_publications._publicationTitle: Molecular profiling of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors associated with neurofibromatosis type 1, based on large-scale real-time RT-PCR.

_contextSnippet: The mean TBP gene Ct (threshold cycle) values for the four tumor samples were 26.18 ± 0.39 (MPNST pool), 26.23 ± 1.45 (plexiform neurofibroma pool) and 26.30 ± 0.47 (dermal neurofibroma pool)
details: Successfully quantified mRNA expression of 489 genes with mean TBP gene Ct values of 26.18 ± 0.39 (MPNST pool), 26.23 ± 1.45 (plexiform neurofibroma pool) and 26.30 ± 0.47 (dermal neurofibroma pool)
